option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if student.nationality and student.nationality.id == country.id else None

div.style: width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if student.state_id and student.state_id.id == state.id else None
'selected' if student.country_id and student.country_id.id == country.id else None
'selected' if student.residence_country_id and student.residence_country_id.id == country.id else None

div.class: card-header bg-white border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.p: No education record yet. Click "Add Result" to add your education details.

div.class: card-header bg-white border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.p: No parent added. Click "Add Parent" to add parent information.
